---
title: "Social Licence to Operate" 
description: "Few useful youtube links"
date: 2021-02-23T09:00:00-03:00
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
        collapsed: true
        smooth_scroll: true
    toc_depth: 3
    fig_caption: yes
    code_folding: show
    number_sections: true

fontsize: 14pt
tags: [MAD434]
comments: false
---

**Innovate for Sustainability Challenge**

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
blogdown::shortcode("youtube", "6t4etVaFdpQ")
```


**The Social License to Operate | Junita Van der Colff | TEDxPretoria**

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
blogdown::shortcode("youtube", "ocx1cBgiSyY")
```

**Overcoming a Lack of Trust: Securing Social License to Operate - ICMM**

```{r, eval=TRUE, echo=FALSE}
blogdown::shortcode("youtube", "p6kMfz5H1cM")
```

`r emo::ji("sun")` GERTUNC
